---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in the ENLA 2026 Callao ML pipeline
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment
- **Component**: [e.g., Sprint 1 - Data Ingestion, Sprint 2 - ETL, Sprint 3 - Features, Sprint 4 - Model Training, Sprint 5 - Alerting, Sprint 6 - Infrastructure]
- **Python Version**: [e.g., 3.9, 3.10, 3.11]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows, macOS, Ubuntu]
- **Branch/Commit**: [e.g., main, develop, or commit hash]

## Error Logs
```
Paste any relevant error logs here
```

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., specific data conditions, MongoDB state, BigQuery dataset state).

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this bug hasn't been reported
- [ ] I have included all relevant environment information
- [ ] I have provided steps to reproduce the issue
- [ ] I have included error logs or screenshots
